title: The Salty Pack
description: Welcome to the Salty Spitoon! How tought are ya?
body:
# Welcome to the Salty Spitoon! How tough are ya?

### This is a modpack of a collection of mods that I find interesting. 

### There is a focus on development and exploration, with many long term goals to work towards, such as going to Space or exploring new dimensions in the Otherside or the Aether.

The modpack could be considered as a "kitchen sink" modpack, seeing as it includes pretty much everything I am interested in. I also update this pack casually, so updates will come from time to time.

I do not own or claim to own any of the mods included within this modpack. All rights are reserved by each mods respective developers. Please see the releases section of this pack to see the included mods and their developers.
